---
title: "Talks"
---

# Invited talks

## Academic

-   *Streamflow variability in Monsoon Asia over the past eight centuries*\
    Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution\
    Tree Ring Lab, Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory, Columbia University\
    Earth Observatory of Singapore & Asian School of Environment, Nanyang Technological University\
    Centre for Climate Research Singapore

-   *A linear dynamical systems approach to streamflow reconstruction*\
    Centre for Climate Research Singapore

## Industrial

-   *Building trust: An engineer's non-engineering challenge*\
    Singapore University of Technology and Design

# Conferences and workshops

-   EGU 2021: Monthly streamflow reconstruction for the Chao Phraya River Basin with tree rings and δ<sup>18</sup>O [\>\>Video](https://youtu.be/G30fbbtf054)

```{r embed-xaringan, echo=FALSE}
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(url = "assets/thai-monthly-egu.html", ratio = "16:9")
```

-   SAPEC-2020 Data and Methods in Paleo Proxy Sciences

-   AGU 2020 (American Geophysical Union) [\>\> Presentation video](https://www.dropbox.com/s/rloje2brbyn0isx/agu-2020-%20PP033-05-hung.mp4?dl=0)

-   MODSIM 2019 (Modelling & Simulation Society of Australia and New Zealand)

-   AOGS 2019 (Asia Oceania Geosciences Society)

-   EGU 2019 (European Geosciences Union)

-   SAPEC-2019 Isotopes in the Environment

-   AGU 2018

-   29th European Dendroecological Field Week, 2018

-   EGU 2018

-   AOGS 2017
